data.one_liner: A month of meals, planned to your macros and budget, ordered with one tap.
data.essence: The competent friend who cooks — quietly plans your month, keeps you balanced and within budget, and hands you a 5-second tap. Effortless, not passive; warm, not clinical; smart, never silent.
data.brand_promise: Give people back the daily hour and headspace that food decisions quietly steal — with meals that stay balanced and within budget, and a plan you always control.
data.positioning_statement: For metro Indians who already order in every day, Rasa is the AI meal planner that decides a month of meals to your macros and your budget and orders them one tap at a time — because trackers only tell you what you ate, and delivery apps only sell you convenience.
data.value_logic: Convenience is the hook that gets people in the door; macro adherence is the paid value; a hard budget cap is the guardrail; neutral cross-platform orchestration is the moat (v2).
data.voice_in_one_line: Calm, warm, pragmatic and precise — sentence case, concrete, never a diet scold. 'Sorted your lunch, tap to confirm.'

pillars.name: Convenience (the hook)
pillars.expression: No 4pm 'what do I eat'; your routine meals are already chosen.

pillars.name: Macros (the value)
pillars.expression: Food that fits your protein and calorie targets — estimated, honest, daily-aggregated.

pillars.name: Budget (the guardrail)
pillars.expression: A hard monthly cap with per-meal envelopes and coupons; eat out daily, stay under your number.

pillars.name: Control (the trust)
pillars.expression: One tap per order, allergens hard-blocked, a visible ledger; nothing spent silently.

visual_essence.type: General Sans / Satoshi for headers, Inter for body, tabular figures for macros and prices.
visual_essence.feel: Spice-warm, appetising, calm; real top-down food on cream; soft rounded plate/bowl shapes; matte flat surfaces.

data.elevator_pitch: You already order in every day — and lose 15 minutes, a chunk of money you can't account for, and your diet by Wednesday. Rasa fixes all three at once. Answer a few questions once, and it plans a month of meals to your macros and your budget, then orders each one via Swiggy after a single tap from you. Smart, balanced, within budget — and never behind your back.
do: Frame everything as health/wellness and everyday balance.
Lead with convenience, sell on macros and budget.
Label every nutrition figure as an estimate.
Honour one-tap: nothing ordered or spent silently.
Sound like a competent, warm friend — calm, concrete, sentence case.
Keep the visuals cream-warm, honest and calm; reserve tomato for the confirm.
dont: Never use convenience-fee framing or add a surcharge to food.
Never make medical, disease, or 'doctor-approved' claims (FSSAI-safe).
Never imply silent auto-ordering or auto-spend.
Never scold about calories or shame food choices.
Never overstate macro precision; it's estimated and daily-aggregated.
Never gamify spending or celebrate ordering with hype.
tagline_options: Eat well, on autopilot — with one tap.
Balanced meals, budget held, one tap.
data.north_star: Weekly retained plans that auto-fill plus at least one confirmed order a day — proof that Rasa has quietly become the way someone eats.
data.compliance_guardrails: Health/wellness framing only; nutrition figures are wellness estimates, never medical claims; allergens hard-blocked; one-tap confirm on every order; visible spend ledger; no convenience surcharge.
